metadata.description: Name of the azd environment, used to derive the resource group and resource names.
Primary location for all resources.
Optional Entra ID tenant id used to protect the API.
Optional Entra ID application (client) id used to protect the API.
Speech recognition language.
Application Insights + Log Analytics for observability.
User-assigned managed identity shared by the API, Functions and Logic Apps.
Key Vault for secrets (Speech key, connection strings).
Principal ids granted secret access (Key Vault Secrets User role).
Storage account with the shared audio and transcripts containers.
Principal ids granted Storage Blob Data Contributor.
Cosmos DB (NoSQL) account with the shared jobs container.
Principal ids granted the Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor role.
Azure AI Speech (Cognitive Services) resource with diarization support, fronted by Azure AI Foundry conventions.
Principal ids granted Cognitive Services User.
Azure Container Registry for the API image.
Principal ids granted AcrPull.
Container Apps managed environment.
Backend API container app (C#) on Azure Container Apps.
Container image. azd overrides this during deployment.
Frontend (Next.js) container app on Azure Container Apps.
Container image. azd overrides this during deployment.
Azure Functions (.NET isolated) pro-code transcription pipeline.
Event Grid system topic + subscription routing BlobCreated events on the audio container to the transcription function via the blobs extension webhook (low-latency trigger).
Name of the Function App hosting the Event Grid blob trigger.
Default host name (e.g. func-xxx.azurewebsites.net) of the Function App.
Name of the function that handles the Event Grid blob trigger.
Logic App Standard hosting the low-code transcription and daily purge workflows.
